scenarios.name: Open Notion AI from the workspace sidebar
scenarios.precondition: Authorized workspace page and expanded left sidebar
steps: Click the round Notion AI tile inside the Notion AI sidebar section
Wait for the UI to stabilize
actual: Center shows How can I help you today?
Saved chats remain visible in the sidebar

scenarios.name: Open an existing saved chat
steps: Click a saved title in a time group
Wait for the conversation to settle
actual: Selected item gets a gray background
Conversation restores its prior scroll position near the bottom

scenarios.name: Create a new saved chat
actual: Notion generates a title from the prompt

scenarios.name: Rename a chat
steps: Edit the prefilled Rename chat textbox
actual: Enter saves without a separate confirmation
Header, sidebar label, and browser title update

scenarios.name: Use the sidebar item hover actions
actual: Timestamp is replaced by Pin and more icon buttons
The menu contains Copy link, Pin, Mark as unread, Rename, Delete, Open in new tab

scenarios.name: Open chat history from the title
steps: Click the title button in the chat header
actual: A 320px-wide popover opens below the title
Threads are grouped by Today, Past week and Past 30 days

scenarios.name: Browser back and forward
steps: From a saved thread use browser Back
actual: Back restores the AI home route and heading
Forward restores the exact saved thread and its title

scenarios.name: Collapse the workspace sidebar
actual: The rail moves to x=-251 leaving a narrow edge

scenarios.name: Collapse and restore agent details
actual: The button accessible name toggles between Minimize and Expand

scenarios.name: Scroll a long conversation
steps: Set internal chat scroll to top
actual: Only the internal x=270/y=44 container scrolls
A floating jump-to-latest button appears away from the bottom

scenarios.name: Mobile chat with sidebar collapsed
actual: Messages become a single narrow column
Share/new/pin/more remain in the top row

scenarios.name: Mobile layout with sidebar expanded
actual: The fixed 270px rail leaves too little content width
Main content retains a minimum width
Chat controls to the right are off-screen
scenarios.risk: This is an observed responsive failure state, not a recommended behavior to reproduce.
